sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: Guggenheim Lowers Price Target for Domino's Pizza (DPZ) to $450
feed.summary: Guggenheim has lowered its price target for Domino's Pizza (DPZ) to $450, maintaining a 'Neutral' rating, consistent with a recent trend of analysts lowering price targets for the company. This adjustment reflects a cautious outlook, despite Domino's Pizza being the world's largest pizza chain with substantial global sales. While analysts' average price target suggests a potential upside, their recent actions indicate a more reserved market sentiment.

feed.title: BD, Waters set completion date for $17.5B biosciences and diagnostics merger
feed.summary: BD and Waters have announced a target completion date of Feb. 9 for their $17.5 billion biosciences and diagnostics merger. This timeline was finalized after Waters shareholders overwhelmingly approved the issuance of shares to BD investors. The merger will see BD spin off its biosciences and diagnostics business to merge with a Waters subsidiary, giving BD shareholders a 39.2% stake in the combined entity and enabling both companies to pursue strategic growth and cost-cutting opportunities.

feed.title: Air Products (APD) Secures Major NASA Contract for Liquid Hydrogen Supply
feed.summary: Air Products (APD) has secured a significant $140 million contract with NASA to supply liquid hydrogen to several key facilities, including the Kennedy Space Center and Marshall Space Flight Center. This agreement highlights Air Products' role as a leading global industrial gas supplier, particularly for hydrogen and helium. Despite the contract, the company faces financial challenges, including declining revenue growth and a negative net margin, urging investors to monitor its future performance closely.

feed.title: Here’s Why Abbott Stock Could Deliver 10% Upside in 2026 After 15% Decline Last Year
feed.summary: Abbott Laboratories (ABT) stock is projected to deliver a 9.9% annualized return and a target price of $142.70 by 2026, representing a 31.8% total upside. This forecast is based on its diversified healthcare operations, consistent operating efficiency, and recent FDA approval for neuromodulation systems. The analysis uses projected revenue growth of 7.6%, operating margins of 24.9%, and an exit P/E multiple of 19.1x, considering both optimistic and pessimistic scenarios for device adoption and diagnostics recovery.

feed.title: What's Going On With Amazon Stock Wednesday?
feed.summary: Amazon (AMZN) stock is trending due to plans for 16,000 layoffs, an updated grocery strategy involving increased investment in Whole Foods Market, and growth in its cloud and retail segments driven by AI partnerships. Analysts from Wedbush, Bank of America, and KeyBanc have weighed in with positive outlooks, citing potential for market share gains in groceries, reduced capital expenditures, and strong revenue growth forecasts for the coming fiscal years. Despite these developments, AMZN shares were slightly down at the time of publication, ahead of its Q4 earnings report.

feed.title: Elevance Health Q4 Earnings Review: No Sign Of An End To The Pain (NYSE:ELV)
feed.summary: Elevance Health, Inc. (ELV) is facing significant margin and volume pressures, with its Q4 operating revenue down 55% year-over-year and weak guidance for 2026. The company's benefit expense ratio remains high at 90% due to medical inflation and increased utilization, impacting profitability. Analyst maintains a Hold rating on ELV, citing weak guidance, sector headwinds, and a lack of near-term catalysts for margin recovery.

feed.title: eBay (EBAY) Reiterates Market Outperform Rating: Key Analyst Ins
feed.summary: Citizens analyst Andrew Boone has reiterated a Market Outperform rating for eBay (EBAY) and maintained a $115.00 price target. This decision aligns with other analysts who have recently raised their price targets for the e-commerce giant. Despite a consensus brokerage recommendation of "Hold," the reiteration suggests continued confidence in eBay's market performance.

feed.title: A Closer Look at Booking Holdings's Options Market Dynamics
feed.summary: Investors have shown a bullish sentiment towards Booking Holdings (NASDAQ: BKNG) through recent options trades, with 11 uncommon trades detected. The market movers are focusing on a price range of $4650.0 to $5800.0 for BKNG over the next three months. Currently, Booking Holdings is trading at $5167.35 with a neutral RSI, and analysts have an average target price of $5897.75.

feed.title: ADM’s ex-CFO faces federal fraud charges
feed.summary: The SEC has accused Vikram Luthar, former CFO of Archer-Daniels-Midland (ADM), of fraud for artificially inflating the nutrition business unit's value through retroactive adjustments. Luthar allegedly orchestrated these changes to meet performance targets, directly benefiting from a $130,000 bonus. ADM settled with the SEC for $40 million and two other executives paid disgorgement, though the company neither admitted nor denied the findings.

feed.title: Google stock price today: Alphabet Class C inches up as regulators circle and a $135 million Android settlement lands
feed.summary: Alphabet Inc.'s Class C shares (GOOG) rose slightly as Google agreed to a $135 million settlement for an Android data use lawsuit, while facing new regulatory scrutiny in Europe and Britain regarding its Search and AI services. Investors are also anticipating Alphabet's earnings report on February 4th, amidst high expectations for Big Tech. The company's heavy investment in AI and potential regulatory changes pose both opportunities and risks for its stock performance.

feed.title: Hot Shot's Secret expands product offerings at Tractor Supply Company
feed.summary: Hot Shot's Secret has significantly expanded its product availability at Tractor Supply Company, adding five new fuel and oil treatments to the existing four. This partnership allows Tractor Supply, a large rural lifestyle retailer, to offer a broader range of high-performance products for both commercial and personal diesel and gasoline-powered equipment nationwide. The expansion includes new products like Premium DEFender, LX4 Lubricity Extreme Fuel Treatment, Gasoline Extreme Fuel Treatment, Diesel Winter Rescue, and EDT+ Winter Defense Anti-Gel Fuel Booster.

feed.title: USW On Strike Against ArcelorMittal In Ohio
feed.summary: Members of United Steelworkers (USW) Local 3057 are on strike against ArcelorMittal in Shelby, Ohio, since January 13th, due to disagreements over wages, health care benefits, and work schedule changes. The 450-member bargaining unit, which produces high-quality steel tubing, is fighting to secure a fair contract, as the company proposes significant changes that could impact worker paychecks and require spouses to use separate insurance plans. The union is receiving strong community support and remains ready to continue bargaining.

feed.title: General Dynamics FY 2025 presentation: double-digit growth amid record backlog
feed.summary: General Dynamics (NYSE:GD) released its full-year 2025 financial results, reporting significant double-digit growth in revenue, operating earnings, and net earnings, alongside a record 30.3% surge in its total backlog. Despite these strong financial and operational improvements across its Aerospace, Combat Systems, Marine Systems, and Technologies segments, the company's stock experienced a pre-market decline. General Dynamics provided optimistic guidance for 2026, projecting continued revenue and EPS growth.

feed.title: GE Vernova Lifts Revenue Forecasts Amid Surging Orders
feed.summary: GE Vernova has significantly increased its revenue guidance for 2026 and 2028, driven by a surge in orders and the early closure of its Prolec acquisition. Despite missing some 2025 EBITDA forecasts, the company saw substantial order growth in its power and electrification segments, with institutional investors increasing their stakes. This positive outlook is further supported by a doubled quarterly dividend and strong analyst ratings, positioning GE Vernova as a key player in the energy transition.

feed.title: General Mills appoints Joan Bottarini to board, declares dividend By Investing.com
feed.summary: General Mills (NYSE:GIS) has announced the appointment of Joan Bottarini, CFO of Hyatt Hotels Corporation, to its board of directors, effective January 26, 2026. The company also declared a quarterly dividend of $0.61 per share, continuing its 127-year streak of uninterrupted dividend payments. This news comes as Essex Property Trust, a company Bottarini previously worked for, also declared a dividend and faced recent analyst downgrades.

feed.title: Littelfuse Inc stock hits 52-week high at $309.56
feed.summary: Littelfuse Inc. (LFUS) stock has reached a new 52-week high of $309.56, reflecting a 25.9% increase over the past year and a 33.85% actual one-year return according to InvestingPro data. The company's strong performance is supported by a healthy current ratio, moderate debt, 16 consecutive years of dividend increases, and recent strategic moves like the acquisition of Basler Electric. Despite trading at a high P/E ratio, analysts like Oppenheimer maintain an Outperform rating with an increased price target, while Benchmark holds a Neutral rating due to a softer Q4 outlook.

feed.title: Mizuho upgrades Applied Materials to Outperform as WFE spending accelerates
feed.summary: Mizuho Securities upgraded Applied Materials (AMAT) to Outperform from Neutral, citing expected benefits from increased capital expenditures in the U.S., Taiwan, and Japan. The firm anticipates the world's second-largest supplier of wafer fabrication equipment will see accelerated spending in the sector. Mizuho also raised its price target for AMAT.

feed.title: Is Analog Devices (ADI) a Buy as Wall Street Analysts Look Optimistic?
feed.summary: Analog Devices (ADI) currently holds an average brokerage recommendation (ABR) of 1.58, indicating a strong buy leaning, with 22 out of 33 firms giving a "Strong Buy" rating. While this suggests optimism, the article cautions that ABRs can be biased due to brokerage firms' vested interests. It recommends using the Zacks Rank, which is based on earnings estimate revisions, as a more reliable indicator for stock performance, noting that ADI currently has a Zacks Rank #2 (Buy).

feed.title: Feld Michael, evp at Becton Dickinson, sells $15k in stock By Investing.com
feed.summary: Michael Feld, Executive Vice President at Becton Dickinson & Co (NYSE:BDX), sold 75 shares of common stock for $15,204. This transaction was executed under a Rule 10b5-1 trading plan. Becton Dickinson has also recently announced a quarterly dividend, authorized share repurchases, and seen its Biosciences & Diagnostic Solutions unit approved for combination with Waters Corporation.

feed.title: EQT jumps to 6th-largest U.S. oil and gas producer in new industry ranking
feed.summary: EQT has risen to become the sixth-largest oil and gas producer in the United States, according to a new industry ranking. This achievement highlights a trend of improved national standings for several Appalachian producers, including two other companies from southwestern Pennsylvania. The natural gas giant's increased position comes amidst various challenges and developments in the energy sector.

feed.title: ImmunityBio (IBRX) Sheds 4% on Profit-Taking After 14-Day Run
feed.summary: ImmunityBio Inc. (IBRX) saw a 4.19% decline after 14 consecutive days of gains, as investors engaged in profit-taking. Despite the recent dip, the company's stock had surged 271% for the month of January due to positive clinical trial results, a significant sales increase for its Anktiva therapy, and international market expansion. ImmunityBio is also expected to release detailed results from its QUILT-3.078 Phase 2 study for glioblastoma treatment.

feed.title: Bank of America's Rock-Bottom P/E and 25% Upside Potential
feed.summary: Bank of America (BAC) experienced a recent pullback despite strong 2025 performance and impressive earnings, bringing its P/E ratio to one of the lowest among mega-cap stocks. Analysts, including Goldman Sachs and Morgan Stanley, see this as a solid buy-the-dip opportunity with potential for over 25% upside from current levels. While risks like proposed credit card interest rate caps exist, BAC's diversified revenue base and scale are expected to provide a buffer.

feed.title: Is Parker-Hannifin (PH) Still Priced Fairly After Its 40% One Year Rally
feed.summary: This article analyzes whether Parker-Hannifin (PH) is still fairly priced following a 40% rally over the past year. Using a Discounted Cash Flow (DCF) model and Price-to-Earnings (P/E) ratio comparison, Simply Wall St suggests the stock may be overvalued by approximately 25.3% based on its intrinsic value and trades above its tailored "Fair Ratio." The analysis encourages investors to consider different valuation approaches and their own narratives.

feed.title: Chipotle Mexican Grill turns up heat with menu innovation
feed.summary: Chipotle Mexican Grill is reintroducing its popular Chicken al Pastor dish to its UK menus for a limited time, marking its second menu innovation in the UK this year. The fan-favourite, last available in 2024, returns due to high demand and will be available starting February 10th. Chipotle is also launching gift cards in the UK and will offer a halal-suitable version of Chicken al Pastor in nearly half of its UK restaurants.

feed.title: AMD stock price rises as chip rally rolls on ahead of Fed decision and earnings
feed.summary: Shares of Advanced Micro Devices (AMD.O) saw a 1.9% increase, reaching $256.72, and peaking at an intraday high of $258.65. This rise is attributed to a broader rally in chip shares, pushing the S&P 500 above 7,000, as investors await a Federal Reserve rate decision and upcoming Big Tech earnings. AMD is set to report its fiscal fourth-quarter and full-year 2025 results on February 3, with particular focus on data-center demand and its AI chip business.

feed.title: Earnings call transcript: Packaging Corp. Q4 2025 misses forecasts
feed.summary: Packaging Corporation of America (NYSE:PKG) reported Q4 2025 earnings that missed both EPS and revenue forecasts, causing a slight premarket stock decline. Despite the miss, the company highlights a positive outlook for 2026 with strategic investments, increased corrugated volume, and completed acquisition integration. Executives expressed optimism about improving demand and future operational efficiency, while addressing challenges like winter storms and inventory management.

feed.title: Humana (HUM) Falls 21% on Medicare Payment Update
feed.summary: Humana Inc. (NYSE:HUM) stock fell 21.13% after the Centers for Medicare & Medicaid Services (CMS) announced a much lower-than-expected 0.09% increase in Medicare Advantage payments for 2027. This flat funding, instead of the anticipated 4-6% growth, raised concerns about profit margins for Humana and other insurance companies like CVS Health and UnitedHealth Group. Humana is scheduled to hold a conference call on February 11, 2026, to discuss its fourth-quarter and full-year 2025 earnings and provide a short-term outlook following these policy updates.

feed.title: Wells Fargo Initiates Coverage on Heartflow With Overweight Rating, $38 Price Target
feed.summary: Wells Fargo has initiated coverage on Heartflow (HTFL) with an "Overweight" rating and set a price target of $38. The medical technology company's stock is currently trading around $31.28. This news comes alongside other recent company updates, including new insurance coverage for its Plaque Analysis and various index inclusions.

feed.title: State receiving nearly $24 million in additional funds from 'forever chemicals' settlement
feed.summary: Delaware is set to receive an additional $23.75 million from E. I. du Pont de Nemours and Company, The Chemours Company, DuPont de Nemours, Inc., and Corteva, Inc., stemming from a 2021 settlement related to PFAS "forever chemicals." This payment was triggered by a recent settlement between these companies and the State of Ohio. The funds will be managed by the Delaware Department of Natural Resources and Environmental Control (DNREC) and Delaware Health and Social Services (DHSS) to support environmental assessments, restoration, research, and justice initiatives concerning PFAS.

feed.title: Contract agreement ends strike at Parker Lord's Summit Township plant
feed.summary: Union workers at Parker Lord's Summit Township plant have ratified a new four-year contract, ending a strike that began on January 10. The agreement provides a 3.5% annual wage increase, bonuses, additional paid holidays, enhanced retirement security, and improved family benefits. The strike was primarily driven by concerns that wages had not kept pace with inflation.

feed.title: BofA, JPMorgan to match US government contribution to Trump Accounts
feed.summary: Bank of America and JPMorgan Chase announced they will match the U.S. government's initial $1,000 contribution to the newly established "Trump Accounts" for eligible employees. These accounts, part of the One Big Beautiful Bill Act, are designed to provide seed money for investment accounts for children born between 2025 and 2028 with a valid Social Security number, aiming to promote long-term wealth building and economic mobility. Both banks also detailed further employee benefits, with BofA awarding $1 billion in equity to employees and JPMorgan granting a special $1,000 award to eligible staff earning under $80,000 annually.

feed.title: Clorox Sweeps Up Purell Maker GOJO in $2.25 Billion Bet on Hygiene Leadership
feed.summary: Clorox has announced its acquisition of GOJO Industries, the maker of Purell hand sanitizer, for $2.25 billion. This strategic move aims to solidify Clorox's position as a leader in the hygiene market, leveraging the strong brand recognition of Purell. The acquisition reflects Clorox's continued investment in health and wellness products.

feed.title: Keysight Technologies stock hits all-time high at 220.22 USD
feed.summary: Keysight Technologies (KEYS) stock has reached a new all-time high of $220.22, surpassing its previous 52-week high. This achievement is backed by a 29.72% increase over the past year and significant innovations in technology testing, including wireless coexistence test solutions, EV charging solutions, and advancements in 5G non-terrestrial networks with Airbus UpNext. The company's strong financial performance, with $5.38 billion in revenue and robust revenue growth, and its liquid assets exceeding short-term obligations, demonstrate market confidence.

feed.title: Mirae Asset Global Investments Co. Ltd. Buys 47,958 Shares of Amgen Inc. $AMGN
feed.summary: Mirae Asset Global Investments Co. Ltd. significantly increased its stake in Amgen Inc. by purchasing an additional 47,958 shares, bringing their total holdings to 591,891 shares valued at over $167 million. This move, along with other institutional investor activities, accounts for 76.50% of the company's stock being held by hedge funds and institutional investors. The article also details recent insider stock sales, Amgen's financial performance, and analyst ratings, indicating a "Moderate Buy" consensus.

feed.title: Earnings call transcript: Otis Worldwide Q4 2025 misses forecasts, stock dips
feed.summary: Otis Worldwide (NYSE: OTIS) reported Q4 2025 earnings per share of $1.03, slightly missing the $1.04 forecast, and revenue of $3.8 billion, below the anticipated $3.89 billion. The market reacted negatively, with the stock dropping over 7% in pre-market trading. Despite the slight miss, the company highlighted strong service segment growth, record modernization orders, and significant investments in modernization and AI technologies, affirming confidence in its service-driven strategy for 2026 and beyond.

feed.title: Microchip Technology (NASDAQ:MCHP) Reaches New 12-Month High Following Analyst Upgrade
feed.summary: Microchip Technology (NASDAQ:MCHP) reached a new 52-week high after Zacks Research upgraded the stock to a strong-buy rating, with shares trading as high as $80.00. Several other analysts also raised their price targets for MCHP, contributing to a "Moderate Buy" consensus rating and an $82.05 price target. The company recently expanded its maXTouch M1 touchscreen-controller lineup for automotive displays and announced a quarterly dividend, while institutional investors also adjusted their holdings.

feed.title: KeyCorp Lowers CommVault Systems (NASDAQ:CVLT) Price Target to $108.00
feed.summary: KeyCorp has lowered its price target for CommVault Systems (NASDAQ:CVLT) to $108.00 from $152.00, while maintaining an "overweight" rating. Despite Q3 earnings beating estimates, several analysts have reduced their price targets due to guidance ambiguity and a faster shift to a SaaS/subscription mix, raising concerns about near-term profitability. The consensus price target from MarketBeat is now $167.83 with a "Moderate Buy" rating, reflecting mixed sentiment among analysts.

feed.title: Invesco Ltd. $IVZ Shares Sold by Y Intercept Hong Kong Ltd
feed.summary: Y Intercept Hong Kong Ltd significantly reduced its stake in Invesco Ltd. by 55.9%, selling 128,768 shares and retaining 101,484 shares valued at approximately $2.33 million. Despite Invesco reporting adjusted Q4 earnings beats ($0.62 EPS, $1.26B revenue) and record AUM, a $1.8 billion intangible impairment led to a GAAP loss, impacting investor sentiment. The company announced a quarterly dividend of $0.21, and analysts maintain a consensus "Hold" rating with a target price of $26.41.

feed.title: Y Intercept Hong Kong Ltd Grows Stock Position in Huntington Bancshares Incorporated $HBAN
feed.summary: Y Intercept Hong Kong Ltd significantly increased its stake in Huntington Bancshares Incorporated (NASDAQ:HBAN) by 81.8% in the third quarter, bringing its total holdings to 137,201 shares valued at approximately $2.37 million. Despite the bank missing Q4 EPS and revenue estimates, analysts maintain a "Moderate Buy" consensus rating with an average target price of $20.11. Huntington Bancshares also announced a quarterly dividend of $0.155 per share, yielding 3.6%.

feed.title: Vest Financial LLC Purchases 11,419 Shares of Alphabet Inc. $GOOG
feed.summary: Vest Financial LLC significantly increased its stake in Alphabet Inc. (NASDAQ:GOOG) by 23.2% in the third quarter, acquiring an additional 11,419 shares and bringing its total holdings to 60,688 shares valued at $14.78 million. This investment comes as Wall Street analysts maintain a "Buy" consensus rating for Alphabet, with an average price target of $327.13, following strong quarterly earnings that surpassed revenue and EPS estimates. Despite some negative sentiment regarding regulatory challenges and increased competition in the AI ad space, the company's stock performance shows a one-year low of $142.66 and a one-year high of $341.20, with a P/E ratio of 33.12.

feed.title: Vanguard Personalized Indexing Management LLC Purchases 22,503 Shares of General Mills, Inc. $GIS
feed.summary: Vanguard Personalized Indexing Management LLC increased its stake in General Mills (NYSE:GIS) by 23.0% in the third quarter, acquiring an additional 22,503 shares to hold a total of 120,515 shares valued at approximately $6.08 million. This comes as General Mills reported beating its quarterly EPS and revenue estimates, alongside announcing a quarterly dividend of $0.61. Despite institutional buying, an insider sold 1,500 shares, and analysts generally rate the stock as a "Hold" with a consensus target price of $53.33.

feed.title: Vienna Powszechne Towarzystwo Emerytalne S.A. Vienna Insurance Group Takes $11.97 Million Position in Deckers Outdoor Corporation $DECK
feed.summary: Vienna Powszechne Towarzystwo Emerytalne S.A. Vienna Insurance Group has acquired a new stake in Deckers Outdoor Corporation, purchasing 118,110 shares valued at approximately $11.97 million. This investment makes Deckers Outdoor its sixth-largest holding, representing 7.1% of the fund's holdings and 0.08% of Deckers' outstanding shares. Despite insider selling by Angela Ogbechie, institutional investors control a significant 97.79% of the company's stock, and analyst ratings are mixed, resulting in a consensus "Hold" rating.

feed.title: Y Intercept Hong Kong Ltd Buys Shares of 11,437 Cintas Corporation $CTAS
feed.summary: Y Intercept Hong Kong Ltd recently acquired 11,437 shares of Cintas Corporation (NASDAQ:CTAS) in the third quarter, valued at approximately $2.35 million. Cintas reported strong Q3 earnings, slightly beating revenue and EPS estimates, and announced a new share buyback program of $1 billion and a quarterly dividend of $0.45. Analyst ratings on Cintas are mixed, with a consensus "Hold" and an average price target of $214.86, though some have recently upgraded their outlook.

feed.title: Y Intercept Hong Kong Ltd Raises Stock Position in Credo Technology Group Holding Ltd. $CRDO
feed.summary: Y Intercept Hong Kong Ltd significantly increased its stake in Credo Technology Group Holding Ltd. (NASDAQ: CRDO) by 351.2% in the third quarter, bringing its total to 19,572 shares valued at $2.85 million. Institutional investors now collectively own about 80.46% of the company's stock. Credo Technology Group also reported strong quarterly earnings, beating analyst estimates for both EPS and revenue, showcasing substantial year-over-year growth.

feed.title: Capital One Solidifies B2B Dominance with $5.15 Billion Acquisition of Fintech Giant Brex
feed.summary: Capital One has announced its acquisition of fintech firm Brex for $5.15 billion, a move designed to bolster its B2B offerings and technology stack. This strategic purchase, following Capital One's acquisition of Discover Financial Services, aims to position the company as a dominant player in business banking and provide a hedge against regulatory changes in consumer lending. The deal represents a significant consolidation in the financial services sector, blending Capital One's financial strength with Brex's AI-native platform and tech-focused clientele.

feed.title: Vanguard Personalized Indexing Management LLC Reduces Stock Holdings in Chipotle Mexican Grill, Inc. $CMG
feed.summary: Vanguard Personalized Indexing Management LLC decreased its stake in Chipotle Mexican Grill (NYSE:CMG) by 19.3% in Q3, selling 37,079 shares and retaining 154,652 shares valued at approximately $6.06 million. Despite the reduction, Wall Street analysts maintain a "Moderate Buy" consensus rating with an average target price of $50.23 for CMG. Chipotle reported Q3 EPS of $0.29, meeting estimates, and revenue of $3.0 billion, slightly below expectations, with the stock trading near $39.91.

feed.title: Y Intercept Hong Kong Ltd Has $2.33 Million Position in VICI Properties Inc. $VICI
feed.summary: Y Intercept Hong Kong Ltd significantly reduced its stake in VICI Properties Inc. by 65.2% during Q3, now holding 71,498 shares valued at approximately $2.33 million. Despite this reduction, institutional investors and hedge funds collectively own a substantial 97.71% of the stock, with other major firms like Norges Bank, JPMorgan Chase & Co., and Geode Capital Management LLC making substantial investments or increasing their positions. Analysts maintain a "Moderate Buy" consensus rating for VICI Properties, with a target price of $34.31, while the company currently trades around $28.47 and offers a quarterly dividend yielding about 6.3%.

feed.title: Y Intercept Hong Kong Ltd Acquires New Holdings in United Airlines Holdings Inc $UAL
feed.summary: Y Intercept Hong Kong Ltd reported acquiring a new stake of 29,381 shares in United Airlines Holdings Inc (UAL) during the third quarter, valued at approximately $2.84 million. This comes as United Airlines beat Q3 earnings estimates with $3.10 EPS against $2.97 and analysts have largely raised price targets for the stock. Company CEO J. Scott Kirby also sold 120,000 shares in December, reducing his stake by about 15.3%.

feed.title: Textron (NYSE:TXT) Announces Earnings Results
feed.summary: Textron (NYSE:TXT) announced its Q4 earnings, reporting an adjusted EPS of $1.73, narrowly missing the consensus, but revenue of $4.18 billion surpassed expectations due to strong aircraft deliveries. The company also updated its FY2026 guidance to an EPS range of $6.40-$6.60 and approximately $15.5 billion in revenue, with a significant part of its outlook shaped by accelerated MV-75 program production. Despite concerns from a more conservative 2026 profit outlook, Textron emphasized its shareholder-friendly capital allocation, having repurchased shares and planning continued buybacks.

feed.title: 8,720 Shares in ResMed Inc. $RMD Acquired by Y Intercept Hong Kong Ltd
feed.summary: Y Intercept Hong Kong Ltd recently acquired 8,720 shares of ResMed Inc. (NYSE:RMD) valued at approximately $2.387 million, as institutional ownership in the company remains significant at 54.98%. ResMed has shown strong financial performance, beating Q3 earnings estimates with EPS of $2.55 and revenue of $1.34 billion, and analysts maintain a "Moderate Buy" rating with an average target price of $296.09. The company also pays a quarterly dividend of $0.60 per share.
